hibernate-mapping.query: Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company =:company and payCheckSplit.SourceDdTxnId =:sourcePaycheckSplitId and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company

Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun inner join payrollRun.PaycheckSet as payCheck inner join payCheck.PaycheckSplitSet as payCheckSplit where payrollRun.Company =:company and payCheckSplit.SourceDdTxnId =:sourcePaycheckSplitId and payCheck.Status =:paycheckState

Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun inner join payrollRun.PaycheckSet as payCheck inner join payCheck.PaycheckSplitSet as payCheckSplit where payrollRun.Company =:company and payrollRun.PaycheckDate =:depositDate and payCheck.Status =:paycheckState

Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun inner join payrollRun.PaycheckSet as payCheck inner join payCheck.PaycheckSplitSet as payCheckSplit where payrollRun.Company =:company and payrollRun.PayrollRunDate <= :payrollRunDate and payCheck.Status =:paycheckState and payCheck.CreatedDate >= payrollRun.CreatedDate and payCheckSplit.EmployeeBankAccount = :employeeBankAccount

Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun inner join payCheckSplit.EmployeeBankAccount as employeeBankAccount where payrollRun.Company =:company and payrollRun.PayrollRunDate <= :payrollRunDate and employeeBankAccount.SourceBankAccountId =:sourceBankAccountId and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState and finTxn.Company =:company and finTxn.CreditBankAccount =:employeeBankAccount and finTxn.TransactionType = 'EmployeeDdCredit' and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company

Select payCheckSplit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun =:payrollRun and payCheckSplit.SourceDdTxnId =:sourcePaycheckSplitId and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company

select payCheck.Id as id, sum(paycheckSpit.PaycheckSplitAmount) as netAmount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payroll, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PaycheckSplit as paycheckSpit, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee where payCheck.PayrollRun=payroll and (payCheck.SourceEmployee = employee or payCheck.DDEmployee = employee) and payCheck.Company=company and paycheckSpit.Paycheck=payCheck and payroll.PaycheckDate >=:payPeriodBeginDate and payroll.PaycheckDate <=:payPeriodEndDate and company.IAMRealmId=:realmId and employee.Id=:employeeId group by(payCheck.Id)
